name: Honey Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil 1 cup sugar and 1/2 cup water until the temperature reaches soft ball stage (234 - 238 F).
2. Slowly pour this mixture over stiffly beaten egg whites, beating constantly until stiff peaks form.
3. Add 3 cups of sugar, honey, peanut butter, and 1/2 cup water to a separate pot. Boil until it reaches the soft ball stage (234 - 238 F).
4. Gradually add this mixture to the first one, continuing to beat until the mixture can hold its shape when dropped from a teaspoon.
5. Add nuts and vanilla extract.
6. Drop the mixture by teaspoonfuls onto waxed paper.
